page_metadata.bioconda__summary: RMBlast is a RepeatMasker compatible version of the standard NCBI BLAST+ suite.
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: RMBlast is a RepeatMasker compatible version of the standard NCBI BLAST+ suite.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: RMBlast is a RepeatMasker compatible version of the standard NCBI blastn program. The primary difference between this distribution and the NCBI distribution is the addition of a new program "rmblastn" for use with RepeatMasker and RepeatModeler.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: RMBlast is a RepeatMasker compatible version of the standard NCBI blastn program. The primary difference between this distribution and the NCBI distribution is the addition of a new program "rmblastn" for use with RepeatMasker and RepeatModeler.
